title: BACAP Complete Collection
description: An addon to BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack which adds an advancement for stacking all blocks and items, with a few extras thrown in.
body:
THIS DATAPACK REQUIRES THE BLAZEANDCAVE ADVANCEMENT PACK TO RUN!

You can download it [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/blazeandcave-s-advancements-pack-1-12/)

Introducing:

BACAP Complete Collection Edition

This datapack some very hard advancements to your Minecraft world

-Extra advancement in BACAP

-Have fun collecting 100 or so more stacks than you normally would (as of 1.21.8)

-It has huge xp rewards

-Cool trophies

-An item reward that will leave you confused even if you get the reference

-NOT an Universal install function because why would it have one



FEATURING A DOCUMENTATION [HERE](https://bit.ly/cc_2_40_doc)

with a few new awesome advancements you will not have to think what to do
for the next probably three more months than you normally would, because you can try to get
the A Complete Collection! advancement and enjoy the mediocre rewards.

Newest 1.19 version [here](https://mega.nz/file/OiBExCYa#vZBf4n1i1epGSGWcqCiD1sJ_SZ8P5rlu6Rl5GyWheeU) and 1.20 version [here](https://drive.proton.me/urls/A48C8413RW#w3u1Nn1X3vBm) (though if you want any other version just ask me for the link)

And you can find Torture Edition, which is necessary for a hidden advancement, [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/bacap-torture-edition/)

You should check it out even if not just for it's version of Complete Collection, of course you wouldn't anyways, it's so much better than this

As well as Suggestion Edition [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/bacap-suggestion-edition/), I may have caused this on my own and I apologize.

Now featuring a language pack [here](https://bit.ly/cc_rp_2_40)!!!
Languages Supported:
English (1.21.11) - CoolgirlΩ
Spanish (1.21.11) - CoolgirlΩ
Upside Down English (1.21.11) - Rounduction

It also adds custom textures for trophies and translates criteria in Advancement Info reloaded



You can find a Version History [here](https://bit.ly/cc_ver_history)

Credits go to:
minecraft-heads.com for the elder guardian head

saladbowls for helping with part of the trophy code

Jamsamamsa for the Advancement idea

Cavinator1 for leaving the Advancement's fate unclear (Also he made the original BACAP I think)

FixingGlobe for making Cereal Dedication which contains the universal install function, has a little bit of code which I used as a base for this advancement and the description for Cereal Dedication which I also used and edited (although that seems stolen and edited from Torture Edition) also helping with a very small part of the advancement code but still helping also updating basically all of 1.5.0 and lastly, helping me fix bugs for 1.6.0

Wolfguy for a cornplete collection, which is this but different

Vee for suggesting the trophy for A Complete Collection, I expanded a bit on it however

Install instructions:

Drag the zip file inside the UNZIP ME to your world's "datapacks" folder

you win!

maybe run /function blazeandcave:install if it doesn't work, make a BACKUP, this could mess up your world.

It should work first try ok I'm sorry, you can always join my server for debugging.
